From The Heart

A Letter To You

My Dearest Mamaahh,

From the moment you entered my life, everything became brighter.

You became my comfort, my happiness, my safest place, and my greatest blessing.

Every memory we created became a chapter I never want to forget.

Thank you for choosing me, supporting me, and loving me through every season of life.

If I had the chance to choose again, I would still choose you.

Again. And again. And forever.

Love, Nisha 🖤

The way you make me feel beautiful
